extortion.description: PEFCO facilitates the financing of U.S. exports by supplementing what is available from commercial banks and other lenders. The company offers a variety of export finance programs, acting as both a direct lender and a secondary market buyer of export loans. To qualify for financing, loans must be secured with guarantees from the Export-Import Bank of the United States. PEFCO also has initiatives to support small businesses and address unique funding challenges for small exporters
